---
name: ✨ Feature Request / 功能需求
about: Suggest a new feature / 建议一个新功能
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description / 功能描述

**English:** Briefly describe the feature you'd like to be added
**中文：** 简要描述你希望添加的功能

## Problem to Solve / 解决的问题

**English:** What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point you're facing
**中文：** 这个功能解决什么问题？描述你遇到的痛点

## Proposed Solution / 建议的实现方案

**English:** If you have ideas, describe how you'd like it to be implemented
**中文：** 如果你有想法，描述一下期望的实现方式

## Alternatives Considered / 替代方案

**English:** Have you considered any alternative solutions?
**中文：** 是否考虑过其他替代方案？

## Environment / 环境信息

- OS: [e.g. Android 14, iOS 17, Windows 11, macOS 14] / 操作系统
- Flutter version: [e.g. 3.24.0] / Flutter 版本
- Plugin version: [e.g. 1.0.6] / 插件版本

## Additional Context / 附加信息

Add any other context about the feature request here / 在此添加关于此功能需求的任何其他信息
